goal: Execute the proven local gmd-dev golden deploy/readback path through the Director/orchestrator authority and return a structured result.
constraints: do not touch real cloud production
do not perform release or promote in this slice
use the already-proven substrate path only: local k3d -> gmd-dev -> Argo CD Application -> ClusterIP frontend -> local port-forward readback
do not edit source GitOps files; local ApplicationSet runtime patch from Wave 1 is the current substrate

release_intent.reason: Wave 2 proves Director-run deploy/readback only; release/promote remain explicitly out of scope.

acceptance_criteria: Director/orchestrator is the execution authority after kickoff
Argo application gmd-dev is Synced and Healthy
local readback succeeds through ClusterIP frontend port-forward
structured result records run ids, deploy result, readback result, and blocker classification if any
